title: Ducky Peripherals
description: A general peripheral addon mod for ComputerCraft Restitched and Tweaked.
body:
# Ducky Peripherals

An add-on peripheral mod for computer craft restitched and tweaked.

See the [wiki](https://github.com/SamsTheNerd/ducky-periphs/wiki) for more details

## Additions

- Weather Machine - gets the weather
- Entity Detector - detects mobs
- Keyboard - click clack, it can be colorful !
- Rubber Duckies - tell them your code, maybe they can help
- Sculkophone - it's like a sculk sensor but for your computer
- Focal Port - read/write iotas between cc and hex casting
- Hex Peripherals - added for various blocks from hex casting

## Mod Integrations
- ComputerCraft: Restitched (**Required**)
- Hex Casting (optional)
- Tech Reborn (adds more crafting recipes)
